title: Smartchime Motion Event Contract
description: Motion detection event published from Home Assistant to Smartchime via MQTT (topic: smartchime/events/motion). Triggers AMOLED video display when active, unless a doorbell event has priority.

active.description: Whether motion is currently detected. true triggers video playback (if doorbell is not active); false stops video.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the event. Naive timestamps are assumed UTC.

video_url.description: RTSP stream or clip URL to display on the AMOLED screen. If omitted, the configured default_stream is used.
